title: FunCraft
description: A small Modpack to play with friends and family, amied to have a stable and fun experience on as low end platforms as possible
body:
# Funcraft
lightweight and fun modpack containing some of the most popular Fabric mods for example the Create and Botania. The aim of the modpack is to make a fun experience for as many people as possible, therfore our second goal is to make the modpack as lightweight as possible.
